gcp.adsense.accounts.get.description: Gets information about the selected AdSense account.

required.description: Required. Account to get information about. Format: accounts/{account}

gcp.adsense.accounts.list.description: Lists all accounts available to this user.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.listChildAccounts.description: Lists all accounts directly managed by the given AdSense account.

required.description: Required. The parent account, which owns the child accounts. Format: accounts/{account}

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.getAdBlockingRecove.description: Gets the ad blocking recovery tag of an account.

required.description: Required. The name of the account to get the tag for. Format: accounts/{account}

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list.description: Lists all the ad clients available in an account.

required.description: Required. The account which owns the collection of ad clients. Format: accounts/{account}

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.get.description: Gets the ad client from the given resource name.

required.description: Required. The name of the ad client to retrieve. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adclientId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.getAdcode.description: Gets the AdSense code for a given ad client. This returns what was previously known as the 'auto ad code'. This is only supported for ad clients with a product_code of AFC. For more information, see [

required.description: Required. Name of the ad client for which to get the adcode. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adclientId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.adunits.g.description: Gets an ad unit from a specified account and ad client.

required.description: Required. AdUnit to get information about. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}/adunits/{adunit}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adclientId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.adunits.list, iterate response["adUnits"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adunitId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.adunits.l.description: Lists all ad units under a specified account and ad client.

required.description: Required. The ad client which owns the collection of ad units. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.adunits.g.description: Gets the ad unit code for a given ad unit. For more information, see [About the AdSense code](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9274634) and [Where to place the ad code in your HTML](https://s

required.description: Required. Name of the adunit for which to get the adcode. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}/adunits/{aduni

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adclientId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.adunits.list, iterate response["adUnits"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adunitId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.adunits.l.description: Lists all the custom channels available for an ad unit.

required.description: Required. The ad unit which owns the collection of custom channels. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}/adun

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.customcha.description: Lists all the ad units available for a custom channel.

required.description: Required. The custom channel which owns the collection of ad units. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}/cust

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.customcha.description: Gets information about the selected custom channel.

required.description: Required. Name of the custom channel. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}/customchannels/{customchannel}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adclientId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.customchannels.listLinkedAdUnits, iterate response["adUnits"][], extract item["name"] → fill {customchannelId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.customcha.description: Lists all the custom channels available in an ad client.

required.description: Required. The ad client which owns the collection of custom channels. Format: accounts/{account}/adclients/{adclient}

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.urlchanne.description: Gets information about the selected url channel.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {adclientId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.payments.list.description: Lists all the payments available for an account.

required.description: Required. The account which owns the collection of payments. Format: accounts/{account}

gcp.adsense.accounts.policyIssues.get.description: Gets information about the selected policy issue.

required.description: Required. Name of the policy issue. Format: accounts/{account}/policyIssues/{policy_issue}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.adsense.accounts.policyIssues.list, iterate response["policyIssues"][], extract item["name"] → fill {policyIssueId}

gcp.adsense.accounts.policyIssues.list.description: Lists all the policy issues where the specified account is involved, both directly and through any AFP child accounts.

required.description: Required. The account for which policy issues are being retrieved. Format: accounts/{account}

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.adsense.accounts.reports.getSaved.description: Gets the saved report from the given resource name.

required.description: Required. The name of the saved report to retrieve. Format: accounts/{account}/reports/{report}

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.adsense.accounts.adclients.list, iterate response["adClients"][], extract item["name"] → fill {reportId}

required.description: Required. Name of the site. Format: accounts/{account}/sites/{site}
